title: clausena dentata var. dunniana
intro: Clausena dentata var. dunniana, also known as Chinese plum or golden rain tree, is a tropical evergreen tree native to southern China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Clausena dentata var. dunniana include its ability to treat digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Clausena dentata var. dunniana is typically prepared as an herbal tea or used in traditional medicine to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
